args:
set -euo pipefail
plugin_root="${VARRO_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"
if [[ -z "$plugin_root" ]]; then
  for candidate in "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/varro/* "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/*/varro/*; do
    if [[ -x "$candidate/bin/varro-mcp" ]]; then
      plugin_root="$candidate"
    fi
  done
fi
if [[ -z "$plugin_root" ]]; then
  echo "Varro plugin root could not be resolved." >&2
  exit 127
fi
exec "$plugin_root/bin/varro-mcp"
